sync.title: Sync & Updates
sync.description: Configure background pulling and which update feed Tolaria follows. Stable only receives manually promoted releases, while Alpha follows every push to main.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the app color mode used for Tolaria chrome, editor surfaces, menus, and dialogs.

autogit.title: AutoGit
autogit.description: Automatically create conservative Git checkpoints after editing pauses or when the app is no longer active.
autogit.unavailable: AutoGit is unavailable until the current vault is Git-enabled. Initialize Git for this vault first.
autogit.enableDescription: When enabled, Tolaria will commit and push saved local changes automatically after an idle pause or after the app becomes inactive.

titles.title: Titles & Filenames
titles.description: Choose whether Tolaria automatically syncs untitled note filenames from the first H1 title.
titles.autoRename: Auto-rename untitled notes from first H1
titles.autoRenameDescription: When enabled, Tolaria renames untitled-note files as soon as the first H1 becomes a real title. Turn this off to keep the filename unchanged until you rename it manually from the breadcrumb bar.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.description: Choose which CLI AI agent Tolaria uses in the AI panel and command palette.
aiAgents.notInstalled: is not installed yet. You can still select it now and install it later.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.description: Choose whether Tolaria shows the Inbox workflow, plus how it moves through items while you triage them.
workflow.organizeDescription: When enabled, an Inbox section shows unorganized notes, and a toggle lets you mark notes as organized.
workflow.autoAdvanceDescription: When enabled, marking an Inbox note as organized immediately opens the next visible Inbox note.

privacy.title: Privacy & Telemetry
privacy.description: Anonymous data helps us fix bugs and improve Tolaria. No vault content, note titles, or file paths are ever sent.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Tolaria's interface.

aiPanel.title: AI Chat
aiPanel.notAvailable: {{agent}} is not available on this machine
aiPanel.installHint: Install it or switch the default AI agent in Settings
aiPanel.notInstalledPlaceholder: {{agent}} is not installed. Open AI Agents in Settings.
aiPanel.emptyWithContext: Ask about this note and its linked context
aiPanel.emptyWithContextAgent: Ask {{agent}} about this note and its linked context
aiPanel.emptyNoContext: Open a note, then ask the AI about it
aiPanel.emptyNoContextAgent: Open a note, then ask {{agent}} about it
aiPanel.subtitleNoContext: The AI will use the active note as context
